name: Tomato Egg Drop Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 cup canned tomatoes (or 2 medium fresh tomatoes, peeled and seeded)
1 tbsp Finely chopped scallions (white part only)
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the chicken stock in a pot and bring to a simmer.
2. If using fresh tomatoes, peel, seed, and cut into 1-inch cubes. If using canned tomatoes, chop them into small chunks.
3. Lightly beat the eggs and combine with sesame oil in a small bowl.
4. Add light soy sauce and salt to the simmering stock, stirring well.
5. Simmer for 5 minutes.
6. Stir in the chopped scallions.
7. Slowly add the egg mixture in a thin stream using a chopstick or fork, pulling the egg into strands (stirring in a figure-eight motion works well).
8. Garnish with finely chopped scallion tops.
